title: Add Airport Authority of India logo to application header

requirements.summary: Add the Airport Authority of India (AAI) official logo to the application header, positioned prominently in the branding area
acceptanceCriteria: AAI logo is displayed in the Header component
Logo is visible on all pages where the Header appears
Logo maintains proper aspect ratio and quality
Logo is appropriately sized for the header layout

file_operations.description: Add the AAI logo to the header branding area. Import and display the generated logo image from frontend/public/assets/generated/aai-logo.dim_200x80.png. Position the logo prominently in the header layout, ensuring it maintains proper aspect ratio and integrates seamlessly with existing header elements (theme toggle and user menu). Ensure the logo is visible and properly styled across light and dark themes.
